x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Hardware Asset Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist HAM AI insights are presented to asset managers. Without it, AI-generated lifecycle recommendations and refresh plans are produced but never surfaced where asset managers work.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_ham_workspace"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist HAM AI insights are surfaced in context for hardware asset managers." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_ham_workspace"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle and refresh insights are available to asset managers." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is not active. Now Assist HAM AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface for hardware asset managers." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Hardware Asset Workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist HAM AI insights to surface in context for hardware asset managers.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccf
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Hardware Asset Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist HAM AI insights are presented to asset managers. Without it, AI-generated lifecycle recommendations and refresh plans are produced but never surfaced where asset managers work.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>HAM Workspace Activation</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_ham_workspace"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist HAM AI insights are surfaced in context for hardware asset managers." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_ham_workspace"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle and refresh insights are available to asset managers." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Hardware Asset Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "Hardware Asset Workspace is not active. Now Assist HAM AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface for hardware asset managers." }; })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>HAM</module> <number>CHK0006239</number> <order>700</order> <remediation_guidance>Activate the Hardware Asset Workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist HAM AI insights to surface in context for hardware asset managers.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1603e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccf</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
